description: Configure and simulate a Demand Responsive Transport (DRT) ride-hailing fleet in SUMO using the Bologna Pasubio network (~/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_buslanes.net.xml). Generate approximately 50 passenger requests for taxi mode ending at 50 seconds and save them to ~/SUMO_Scenarios/ridehailing/persons.rou.xml. Create a fleet of 15 idle taxis (vType 'taxi', vClass 'taxi') with the taxi device enabled, departing at time 0, and save the definitions to ~/SUMO_Scenarios/ridehailing/taxis.add.xml. Ensure the taxis idle and wait for dispatch. Set up a simulation configuration at ~/SUMO_Scenarios/ridehailing/taxi.sumocfg that uses a greedy dispatch algorithm and runs for 3600 seconds. Calculate the average waiting time for all served persons from the simulation's trip information and save the single numeric result to ~/SUMO_Scenarios/ridehailing/average_wait.txt.
